problem:
What is the difference between Bower and npm?.

What is the fundamental difference between bower and npm? Just want something plain and simple. I've seen some of my colleagues use bower and npm interchangeably in their projects.

(attempted fix: --no-lockfile-verify "Skip lockfile integrity check")
memory_hint: Do not use --no-lockfile-verify. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--no-lockfile-verify` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
